title: eragrostis sabulicola
intro: Eragrostis sabulicola, also known as coastal love grass, is a species of grass that is native to Australia, particularly in the coastal regions. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis sabulicola include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
